name: Kobold War Party
description: Armored kobold warriors led by a mystic shaman block your path!

cleared_kobold_mine.display_message: The kobolds have been driven from the mine shafts!

ambient_description: Kobold warriors bang their clubs against the walls, creating a deafening rhythm. Behind them, a shaman chants ominously, bone fetishes rattling.
victory_description: The last kobold warrior falls. The shaman's chanting stops abruptly as the tribe's defenders are defeated. The mine tunnels fall silent.
defeat_description: The kobold war party proves too strong. You fall back, their triumphant screeching echoing through the tunnels.
